name: Almond Buttercrunch Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom and sides of an 8 or 9 inch cake pan with foil.
2. Butter the foil heavily.
3. Combine almonds, butter, sugar, and corn syrup in a 10-inch skillet.
4. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
5. Continue boiling until the mixture turns golden brown, about 5 to 6 minutes.
6. Quickly spread the candy into the prepared pan.
7. Allow the candy to cool until firm.
8. Remove the candy from the pan by lifting the edges of the foil.
9. Break into pieces if desired.
Makes: About 3/4 lb
